title: Entry of land for inspection
doc_html:
§1210.  Entry of land for inspection

The supervisors shall have authority to go upon any lands within the district to determine whether land-use regulations adopted under the provisions of R.S. 3:1209 are being observed.
doc_text:
§1210.  Entry of land for inspection
The supervisors shall have authority to go upon any lands within the district to determine whether land-use regulations adopted under the provisions of R.S. 3:1209 are being observed.
